title: Contract Project Manager – Rail Infrastructure (Leeds)
description_raw: Rullion are seeking a Project Manager for a rail infrastructure contract in Leeds. The role involves managing track and civils renewals on the TransPennine Route Upgrade, coordinating multi-discipline teams including P-way, OLE, and civil structures. Rate: £695–£705/day outside IR35. Contract: 6 months. Start: 14 July 2026. Prince2/APM essential. NEC3/4 experience required. BPSS clearance needed.
